final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-video vertical cover for a gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch keynote visual language, Dieter Rams Braun industrial minimalism, 2020s high-end tech editorial (The Verge / Wired cover spreads); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds grid; must place large headline text as the dominant eye-catching element
Subject: must include the GGU gaming monitor as the hero product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium, high-contrast tech atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary subtitle)
Constraints: must be vertical format suitable for short-video cover (9:16)
Avoid: cluttered layout, decorative noise, low-contrast text
